name: Cheesecake Ala Linda-Bah-Linda
recipeIngredient: 4 pieces of Philadelphia cream cheese, each weighing 8 oz, at room temperature
2 containers of sour cream, each weighing 16 oz, at room temperature
1 and 1/3 cups vanilla wafers, finely crushed
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Combine the ingredients for the crust and press into the bottom of a greased 10-inch springform pan. Mix the filling ingredients and beat until well combined; do not overbeat. Pour the filling mixture into the pan. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
